problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Thermoelectric. Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
